data_collected.source_quote: Netflix collects information on watch history and ratings, viewing day, time, location and device, search queries, abandonment rates, scrolling behavior and whether content was paused, rewound or fast-forwarded.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Data profiles are created and used for personalised advertisements.

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Data is shared with advertising partners and service providers that facilitate the sale and management of advertisements.

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Data profiles are created for personalized advertisements based on viewing behavior.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Advertising Companies may collect advertising information from advertisers, service providers that facilitate the sale and management of advertisements, and other sources.

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Users can opt out of behavioral advertisements by changing the 'Behavioral Advertising' setting in 'Privacy and data settings'.

encrypted_in_transit.source_quote: Netflix uses Transport Level Security (TLS) encryption of customer information and search queries.

gaps: access and delete rights not mentioned
GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Netflix collects extensive behavioral data for personalization and targeted advertising. While users can opt out of behavioral ads, they will still see ads (just not behavioral ones). TLS encryption used in transit. Dutch DPA fined Netflix 4.75 million euros in 2024 for insufficient transparency about data collection and third-party sharing. Contact information shared with third parties for marketing using deidentification. Users cannot access or delete full data profile based on available information.
